programmes.show_description: From nail-biting near misses to encounters with things that go bump in the night, we've got it all caught on camera. (S4, ep 7)
New & Exclusive. Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for suspected offences. (S20, ep 10)
Documentary series from New Zealand following the madness and mayhem faced by intrepid officers as they pull over motorists for a variety of suspected offences. (S21, ep 1)

A traveller claims he's flown in for a wedding, but officers don't believe his story and clearance for a package from China isn't going swimmingly. (S1, ep 2)
A tense traveller returns from a short trip to Colombia with an unusual amount of luggage and a package from India is stopped at the door. (S1, ep 3)
Border Force officers interrogate a multi-millionaire with a questionable travel history and an exotic dancer returning from Bali has officers worried. (S17, ep 19)
Officers are shocked when they find syringes in a man's luggage, a suspicious container arrives in Brisbane and a shipment of lollies is not what it seems. (S17, ep 20)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 1)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 2)
All in a Days Work: Officers deal with a driver who claims that his glasses case looks like a phone, a motorist causes mayhem on the roads and another refuses his fine politely. (S12, ep 1)
Lead Shoes: A driver blames his shoes for his excessive speed, a night time dog walk turns into chaos and a mechanic gets into a world of trouble. (S12, ep 2)
A bad-tempered drill worker returning home from Japan goes one step too far with officers, while a Californian woman hides something in her child's stroller. (S1, ep 6)
A Korean bride-to-be tries to enter Canada as a tourist, and the Marine Enforcement Team tackles a massive Japanese freighter carrying an illegal passenger. (S1, ep 7)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S8, ep 9)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S8, ep 10)
A man of mystery has officers on high alert, a situation arises at the Container Examination Facility and a man tries to smuggle goods into the country. (S17, ep 8)
All hands are on deck as a mystery unfolds, a couple try sneaky tactics to smuggle dangerous goods and an unusual package has officers shocked. (S17, ep 9)
In Perth, a woman raises suspicions when officers find incriminating texts on her phone. Plus, a shipment of aquarium products is not what it seems. (S17, ep 10)
A smuggling attempt unfolds at the Brisbane Container Examination Facility. Meanwhile, a passenger's unusual behaviour raises alarm bells. (S17, ep 11)
If Wishes Were Horses: The fantasies of the DS9 crew are brought to life. Sisko dreams of baseball, Dr Bashir of Dax and O'Brien finds himself caught up in a fairytale.
Pretence: Skaara and Klorel are put on trial to decide which one of them lives and which one dies. (S3, ep 15)
Critical Care: The Doctor is abducted from Voyager, and forced to work in a hospital where patients are treated in accordance to their social status. (S7, ep 5)
Preemptive Strike: Ro Laren's homecoming is interrupted when Federation ships from the renegade group, the Maquis, attack a Cardassian vessel.
Haunted House: The team find a creature capable of camouflaging itself at an abandoned house. Meanwhile, the headquarters is infiltrated by someone who should have been dead. (S3, ep 2)
All the Rage: When a bus explosion kills several innocent people, the team jumps into action. Scola tries to balance fatherhood and his job. (S6, ep 1)
Dopestick: Jess LeCroix and his elite team of FBI Fugitive Task Force agents hunt for a shadowy doctor who has been recorded murdering his wife.
The Seven Year Itch: As Nick, Hank and Wu investigate a body found in a park, the trio are led to a Wesen with a chilling dinner routine. (S6, ep 5)
If You're Going to Bow, Bow Low: As the action-chocked drama concludes, Ah Sahm rejects his warrior roots. Meanwhile, Leary pays Mercer a violent visit. (S1, ep 10)
Series shining a new light on modern policing in Manchester and the challenges faced by officers as they come face to face with a range of criminal and social issues. (S1, ep 4)
Continuing the fifth season of the explosive documentary following Lincolnshire cops as they fight crime across one of the UK's largest counties. (S5, ep 7)
Slowest Getaway: A driver on the run from police crashes a stop sign and risks a head-on collision with a bus. Can he escape both the police and a serious smash? (S10, ep 1)
Brand New Car: Officers Damien O'Brien and Steve Mottram stop a woman who likes to let her dog ride shotgun - even when her boyfriend is in the car. (S10, ep 2)
Reality series following the work of New Zealand's customs agents. (S15, ep 7)
Reality series following the work of New Zealand's customs agents. (S15, ep 8)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S5, ep 9)
Documentary following the men and women who help keep motorists safe on some of the most perilous highways and byways of New Zealand. (S5, ep 10)

An American is carrying some cold-blooded companions in his backseat at the Detroit-Windsor tunnel and in New York, a traveller is possibly smuggling. (1, ep 4)
In Michigan, the canine unit uncovers double trouble. Bloodstained baggage is found at Detroit Metro Airport. (S1, ep 5)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 3)
Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 4)

Fly-on-the-wall documentary series following the men and women who defend Australia from drug runners, illegal immigrants and terrorists. (S2, ep 6)
Missing Teeth: A marijuana user crashes his motorbike into the back of a car, a learner finds his car is too much to handle and a mishap causes a man to lose his teeth. (S12, ep 3)
Undies. Seatbelt. Simple: A driverless car crashes into a house, a drink driver is pulled over and a speeder accepts his fine with a bit of humour. (S12, ep 4)
Officers suspect an IT consultant has arrived for more than just a holiday, and a surfer returns from Southeast Asia with a dodgy souvenir. (S1, ep 8)
The Inland Enforcement Team track down an alleged German sex offender, while a detector dog sniffs out trouble in an unclaimed suitcase from Dubai. (S1, ep 9)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 1)
New Zealand reality series following the work of customs officers as they prevent drug smuggling, illegal immigrants and more. (S9, ep 2)
Identical packages at the mail centre raise alarm bells, a passenger goes missing during a bag search and a young man is distraught after being caught. (S17, ep 12)
Officers interrogate a popular woman, a religious figurine may be concealing something sinister and a student from China is on the brink of being sent home. (S17, ep 13)
A man is raising red flags when he arrives in Brisbane. A woman tries to smuggle dangerous goods and officers find some strong 'tea' at the air cargo facility. (S17, ep 14)
A woman brings contents of her fridge with her, a suspicious clock at the mail centre has officers worried and a man returning from Cambodia raises alarms. (S17, ep 15)
The Forsaken: Lwaxana Troi visits DS9 and is fascinated by Odo. Trapped in an elevator with the Chief of Security, she discovers what happens when he reverts to his gelatinous form.
Urgo: The minds of SG-1 are invaded by a curious being. (S3, ep 16)
Inside Man: A hologram of Barclay, direct from Starfleet, arrives with instructions to get Voyager home within three days. The Doctor's suspicions are aroused. (S7, ep 6)
All Good Things - Part 1: Picard finds himself travelling between the past, present and future while attempting to prevent the destruction of mankind.
Medical Mayhem: The team must capture Diictodons that have come through an anomaly and are wreaking havoc at a hospital. Helen sends a clone of Cutter to infiltrate the ARC. (S3, ep 3)
Get Your Hopes Up: A truck crashes into the station, causing a power outage and starting a fire. Bode's ex-girlfriend, Cara, faces multiple medical emergencies. (S1, ep 10)
Get that Revolution Started: The team works to hunt the sniper responsible for killing an American during a Belgian biomedical lab attack. (S1, ep 19)
Breakfast in Bed: After a vicious murder, Nick and Hank hunt a dream-eating Wesen who appears to be preying on the guests of a cheap hotel. (S6, ep 6)
